method.ablation: remove the defined commitment, not merely its label, and recompute all dependent values and the registered discriminator
method.aggregation: derive every candidate-axis result from complete trial records; genericity and scope dependence never entail nonnecessity
method.cost_rule: no replacement or derivability conclusion is terminal until reconstruction machinery is accounted
method.equivalent_reintroduction: if the same commitment is restored under another name, primitive necessity may be refuted but structural commitment necessity is not refuted
method.reconstruction: record the exact replacement formulation and all added primitives, operations, constraints, hidden state, and semantic clauses

nonclaims: the prior summary records constitute destructive trial evidence
scope dependence is a negative result
